task_completion.description: Create the master keyfile and the alpha volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal showing 'master_key' exists in /home/ga/Keyfiles/ and 'project_alpha.hc' exists in /home/ga/Volumes/.

task_completion.description: Mount the alpha volume and copy the sample file into it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal showing 'SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt' located inside the mounted project_alpha volume directory.

task_completion.description: Create an exact copy of the alpha volume named project_beta.hc.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal showing 'project_beta.hc' alongside 'project_alpha.hc' in the /home/ga/Volumes/ directory.

task_completion.description: Change the password for the beta volume and remove the keyfile requirement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt 'Change Volume Password' dialog for project_beta.hc showing the new password being entered and the keyfile being removed from the 'New' section (or no keyfiles listed for the new configuration).

task_completion.description: Change the Header Key Derivation Algorithm to Whirlpool for the beta volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt dialog showing the PKCS-5 PRF (Header Key Derivation Algorithm) being changed to 'Whirlpool' during the volume password/header update.

task_completion.description: Verify the beta volume mounts successfully and preserves the internal data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: VeraCrypt main window showing project_beta.hc successfully mounted, and a file manager or terminal showing the mounted beta volume still contains 'SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt'.

integrity.description: The agent must use VeraCrypt (GUI or CLI) to create and modify the volumes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the VeraCrypt application interface or veracrypt terminal commands being executed, rather than just creating empty files with a .hc extension.

integrity.description: The agent must actually use the volume tools to change the password and algorithm.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the VeraCrypt 'Volume Tools' -> 'Change Volume Password' dialogs or equivalent CLI commands, rather than the agent just typing the expected answers into a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent must copy the actual sample file into the mounted volumes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt' should be copied using file manager actions (copy/paste) or terminal commands (cp), not just created as a new empty text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Alpha volume path: /home/ga/Volumes/project_alpha.hc. Beta volume path: /home/ga/Volumes/project_beta.hc. Keyfile path: /home/ga/Keyfiles/master_key. Sample file to be preserved: SF312_Nondisclosure_Agreement.txt. Alpha password: 'AlphaTeam2024!'. Beta password: 'BetaTeam2024!'. Target hash algorithm for Beta: Whirlpool.
